title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS video demonstrates five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations and token waste in agentic systems. Semantic tool selection filters context windows, graph RAG provides computed answers for precise queries, multi-agent validation catches failures, symbolic guardrails enforce rules in code, and runtime guardrails enable agent self-correction.
